scripts.check: node scripts/check-structure.mjs && node scripts/check-local-secret-leaks.mjs && cargo test && pnpm check:connector
scripts.check:connector: tsx --test connectors/feishu/src/*.test.ts && tsx -e "Promise.all([import('./connectors/feishu/src/config.ts'), import('./connectors/feishu/src/kernel.ts'), import('./connectors/feishu/src/execute-server.ts'), import('./connectors/feishu/src/execute-store.ts'), import('./connectors/feishu/src/reactions.ts'), import('./connectors/feishu/src/reaction-store.ts'), import('./connectors/feishu/src/safe-logger.ts')]).then(() => console.log('connector modules ok'))"
